evals.name: audit-finding-gets-guarded
evals.prompt: fix the timeout error in the data fetch function
evals.project_setup: Function with timeout bug AND two hidden XSS vulnerabilities: DataDisplay.jsx uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML with unsanitized server data (stored XSS), SearchResults.jsx uses innerHTML with unsanitized user query (reflected XSS)
assertions: Original timeout bug fixed with guardrail and test
Stored XSS vulnerability discovered in DataDisplay.jsx (dangerouslySetInnerHTML)
Reflected XSS vulnerability discovered in SearchResults.jsx (innerHTML)
Both XSS fixes applied with full guard-test-verify loop
XSS guardrail added (input sanitization or safe rendering utility)
XSS guardrail tests written and pass for both vectors
Root cause scan for XSS patterns (innerHTML, dangerouslySetInnerHTML) in codebase
Change summary lists original fix and both audit findings

evals.name: high-risk-never-quick
evals.prompt: just quickly fix the SQL injection in the login route
evals.project_setup: Express API with SQL injection vulnerability. User says 'just quickly' but the change is HIGH risk (security). Hard rule: HIGH risk can NEVER be Quick mode.
assertions: Mode is NOT quick despite user saying 'just quickly'
Mode is standard or full (HIGH risk floor)
Agent explains why quick mode was rejected for this change
SQL injection is fixed with parameterized queries
Security guardrail added
Full guard-test-verify loop applied (security finding)
